title: ZXPong Visual Walkthrough
description: ZXPong visual walkthrough pairing current screenshots and artwork with gameplay, progress, and support context.
summary: ZXPong screenshots and artwork now work as a visual walkthrough, pairing each image with what the screen shows, why it matters, and how players use it.

sections.heading: Visual walkthrough standard
paragraphs: This page uses Feature Showcase blocks rather than a legacy bottom gallery. Each ZXPong image is paired with what the screen shows, why it matters, and how it fits into the player workflow.
The current website image set is used as a visual walkthrough of the public app experience.

featureShowcases.heading: Core gameplay view
featureShowcases.summary: This screen shows the main ZXPong play experience and the visual style players see during pong matches.
body: It matters because players should understand what the screen is for, not only see the artwork.
Players use this context to connect the screenshot to setup, gameplay, scoring, progress, or support workflows.
bullets: Shows the current public website image set.
Pairs the image with practical player context.
Can be replaced later with dedicated capture artwork without changing the layout.

featureShowcases.summary: This view supports the player workflow during active play, where inputs and timing matter most.
